steps: At 7am: 14 loaves, 8am: 23 loaves, 9am: 32 loaves, 10am: 41 loaves. The increase each hour: from 7am to 8am: 23 - 14 = 9 loaves, from 8am to 9am: 32 - 23 = 9 loaves, from 9am to 10am: 41 - 32 = 9 loaves. So the pattern is adding 9 loaves each hour. Therefore, from 10am to 11am: 41 + 9 = 50 loaves.
